Not used      by the singleton's own logic (only ever read via the proxy's      fallback `masterCopy` shortcut)."}},"title":"SafeMockSingleton","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Singleton implementation of the testenv Safe mock. Equivalent to         the prior monolithic `SafeMock.sol` except:         - Slot 0 is reserved for the `singleton` address so `SafeMockProxy`           can delegatecall into this contract without storage collisions           (mirrors canonical `Singleton` parent of `Safe.sol`).         - Owner/threshold initialization happens via `setup(...)` with the           canonical Safe v1.5.0 8-parameter signature. `to`, `data`,           `fallbackHandler`, `paymentToken`, `payment`, and           `paymentReceiver` are accepted for ABI compatibility but ignored           (no modules / no gas refund / no fallback handler in the mock).         - The constructor seeds `threshold = 1` on the singleton itself so           a direct `setup` call on the singleton reverts \u2014 setup is only           reachable through a fresh proxy whose slots start zeroed.         - `execTransaction` still rejects `gasPrice != 0`; owner management           skips the `authorized` modifier (intentional simplification).         EIP-712 constants, `domainSeparator`, `getTransactionHash`,         `checkSignatures`, and `isValidSignature` are byte-for-byte         identical to the prior `SafeMock`, which itself mirrors Safe v1.5.0.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/SafeMockSingleton.sol":"SafeMockSingleton"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":100},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/=lib/compliance/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":@poseidon2-evm/=lib/pool/lib/poseidon2-evm/src/",":@predicate/=lib/compliance/lib/predicate-contracts/",":@safe-global/safe-smart-account/=lib/pool/lib/safe-smart-account/",":@uniswap/v2-periphery/=lib/pool/lib/v2-periphery/",":compliance/=lib/compliance/",":ds-test/=lib/predicate-contracts/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/predicate-contracts/lib/forge-std/src/",":foundry-huff/=lib/pool/lib/poseidon2-evm/lib/foundry-huff/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":hardhat/=node_modules/hardhat/",":huffmate/=lib/pool/lib/poseidon2-evm/lib/huffmate/src/",":multicall/=lib/multicall/",":openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/=lib/predicate-contracts/lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":openzeppelin-foundry-upgrades/=lib/predicate-contracts/lib/openzeppelin-foundry-upgrades/src/",":openzeppelin-upgradeable/=lib/predicate-contracts/lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/",":pool/=lib/pool/src/",":poseidon2-evm/=lib/pool/lib/poseidon2-evm/src/",":predicate-contracts/=lib/predicate-contracts/src/",":safe-smart-account/=lib/pool/lib/safe-smart-account/",":solidity-stringutils/=lib/pool/lib/poseidon2-evm/lib/foundry-huff/lib/solidity-stringutils/",":solmate/=lib/predicate-contracts/lib/solmate/src/",":stringutils/=lib/pool/lib/poseidon2-evm/lib/foundry-huff/lib/solidity-stringutils/",":stx-circuit/=lib/stx-circuit/",":utils/=lib/predicate-contracts/lib/utils/"]},"sources":{"contracts/SafeMockSingleton.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7396cebbc380c54a9266c541ca615b9c0a00ebf4bcf882b1c65f0469e6e28d44","license":"
